# Dia Browser Release Notes - Latest (v1.23.0)

## Release Information
- **Version:** 1.23.0
- **Release Date:** March 19, 2026, 5:00 PM ET
- **Location:** Brooklyn, USA
- **Issue Number:** 17

## Main Title
"From review to merge to what's next"

## Key Features Released

### GitHub Live Tab Groups Improvements
The update enhances previously shipped GitHub PR integration features with several refinements:

1. **Celebration Animations** - "As you complete a review or merge a PR, you'll see subtle animations that signal the transition from in-progress to done"

2. **Automatic Cleanup** - When PRs merge, Dia automatically cleans up, providing visual confirmation of completion

3. **Finished Work Recovery** - Users can hover to preview recently completed PRs and restore them to view

### Visual Polish
"A little delight along the way" - expressive animations added to basic browser controls (back, forward, reload buttons)

## Additional Content
- One Last Thing section featuring a team member's personal winemaking project update
- Links to three previous releases (v1.22.0, v1.21.0, v1.20.0)

## Navigation Elements
- Download button/link available
- "View All Release Notes" option provided
- Footer with company links and social media references
